headings.style: Cyber/Web3 feel, wide display sans. Use tracking-tighter.

technical_data.usage: Use for AI tokens, system prompts, API keys, data points, and code-like elements.

rules: Headlines MUST use tight letter spacing: tracking-tight or tracking-tighter.
Overlines/Labels MUST be Uppercase + Tiny + Wide Spacing (tracking-[0.2em]).
The jump between a heading and subheading must not exceed 2 Tailwind steps.
Never use Inter, Roboto, or Open Sans for Headings.
No pure black (#000000) or pure grey. Tint greys with blue/violet.
Use Black-on-Black layers (matte vs glossy) to ground neon colors.
Ensure text meets APCA standards. Provide text-shadow for text over images/gradients.

glassmorphism.usage: Sticky Headers, Floating Navs, Toasts, Modal Overlays
glassmorphism.rule: Never use pure transparent backgrounds for overlays.

tracing_beam.usage: High-conversion Cards (Role Selection, Active Tutor Packs, Model Router Cards)
tracing_beam.implementation: A border that isn't static. Use framer-motion to animate a glowing gradient line traveling around the container edge with blur-md behind it.

retro_futurism.usage: Terminal-style code blocks or System Prompt editors in Model Router
retro_futurism.implementation: Dark indigo background, high-contrast borders, drop-shadow-[0_0_8px_rgba(0,240,255,0.5)] on active focus.

component_guidelines.general: ALWAYS use pure HTML + Tailwind for structural/marketing layouts. Use customized Shadcn for forms, dialogs, dropdowns.
component_guidelines.buttons: Pill-shaped or sharp technical buttons with interaction animations. NEVER use default 'Vercel-look'.
component_guidelines.forms: Use Shadcn Input, Select, Form. Do not build from scratch. Use pure white or neon glowing focus rings (focus:ring-primary).

model_router_ui.provider_cards: Glassmorphism cards with provider logo, masked API key input (reveal/copy buttons), enable/disable toggle switch.
model_router_ui.fallback_chain: Drag-and-drop vertical list. Use drag handles. Show ghost image when dragging. Add up/down fallback controls.
model_router_ui.system_prompt_editor: Monospace text area (retro-futurism style) with 'Save' state and token counter.

content_generation_form.layout: Two-column bento grid. Left: Upload/Paste area. Right: Config (Content type, EN/BM toggle). Bottom: Preview and Publish.
content_generation_form.upload_zone: Dashed neon border with hover state (bg-primary/5).

student_progress_cards.style: Neumorphism mix (clay & crisp) with 1px border. Solid background, dark mode friendly. Progress bars must use neon primary color with inner glow.

marketing_landing.rule: Asymmetry. Leave breathing room. Do not fill 100% of the grid perfectly.

dashboards.rule: Every pixel utilized. Use h-full on children.

layouts.spacing: Generous spacing. p-6, p-8, p-12. Containers with borders MUST have internal padding.
layouts.alignment: Optical alignment over geometrical. Left-align dense content. Never center-align by default.
layouts.mobile_first: Start with grid-cols-1. Images max-h-[80vh] on mobile.

requirements: Hover states for all interactive elements (must be explicitly set, e.g., hover:bg-slate-900 hover:text-white).
Micro-animations for toggles and drag-drop actions.
DO NOT use 'transition: all'. Target specific properties.

accessibility.contrast: Min 4.5:1 for normal text, 3:1 for large text.
accessibility.focus: Focus states must have HIGHER contrast than default state.
accessibility.testing: All interactive elements MUST include data-testid attribute (e.g., data-testid='login-admin-btn').

image_urls.description: Dynamic abstract depiction of digital circuits with vivid lights and glowing lines.
Person looking at glowing screens, representing the student dashboard access.
Mother and daughter studying together at a table.
A digitally rendered abstract image showcasing a futuristic eye with complex network patterns.

media.rules: Never use placeholder URLs. Preserve brand names if any.

3d_libraries.usage: Use for the Landing Page Hero section to create an immersive, abstract neural network or glowing orb that reacts to scroll/mouse movement.
3d_libraries.lighting: Ensure 3D scenes have adequate lighting so objects are clearly visible. Avoid flat, muddy renders.

instructions_to_main_agent.language_support: Implement a global EN / BM (Bahasa Melayu) toggle in the header. State should be managed globally.
instructions_to_main_agent.theme_setup: Default to Dark Mode (Electric & Neon archetype). Provide a robust setup in Tailwind config.
instructions_to_main_agent.routing_structure: Isolate the Marketing Landing Page from the Dashboards. Dashboards must have protected layouts with Sidebar.
development_phases: 1. Setup Tailwind config with exact color tokens and font families (Unbounded, Outfit, JetBrains Mono).
2. Build 3D Landing Page with Hero, About, Contact, and Role-Based CTAs (Admin/Parent/Learner).
3. Develop Admin Dashboard: Sidebar, Stats Overview, Content Generator Form, and Model Router.
4. Develop Student Dashboard: Tutor Packs, Progress, Cards for Summaries/Quizzes/Flashcards.

UNIVERSAL_GUIDELINES_FOR_MAIN_AGENT: You tend to converge toward generic outputs. Make creative, distinctive frontends.
Dark colors look good independently without gradients. DO NOT use dark colors as full-screen gradients.
Don't make generic centered layouts. Create depth through layered design elements with z-index hierarchy.
Use glass-morphism effects with backdrop filters (12-24px blur).
You MUST NOT apply universal transition. Eg: 'transition: all'. Target specific properties.
You MUST NOT center align the app container, ie do not add '.App { text-align: center; }'.
Always use modern button styles with interaction animations & relevant color.
NEVER use AI assistant Emoji characters (🤖🧠💭💡) for icons. Use lucide-react or @phosphor-icons/react.
Every interaction needs micro-animations. Static = dead.
Use 2-3x more spacing than feels comfortable.
Missing image categories = you must use the provided URLs, DO NOT use placeholder text.
